test_setup_files.purpose: Global test setup - isolate tests from user's LLM environment

issues.description: Scripts modify environment variables without restoration, affecting user's shell after execution
issues.recommendation: Add backup/restore pattern or use isolated child processes

issues.description: E2E model tests set env vars in beforeAll without restoration, affecting subsequent test files if run in same process
issues.recommendation: Add afterAll hook to restore original values

issues.description: Model comparison test modifies env in test loop without restoration
issues.recommendation: Backup env before loop and restore after, or use isolated test cases

issues.description: Ralph loop test clears API keys in beforeEach without restoration
issues.recommendation: Add afterEach to restore values or use backup/restore pattern

issues.description: GUI config API test deletes ATELIER_* env vars without explicit restoration (comment says intentional)
issues.recommendation: Consider adding afterAll to restore these values for clarity

recommendations.action: Add backup/restore pattern to all scripts in scripts/ directory
recommendations.pattern: Use the backupEnv/restoreEnv pattern from test/e2e/full-loop-local.test.ts

recommendations.action: Add afterAll restoration to E2E model test files
Fix ralph-loop.test.ts to restore API keys after tests
Consider adding explicit restoration to GUI config test
